productDisplayName: Fusion Beats Women Black & Red Tunic
description: Style Note We like the range of bright and colourful tunics, kurtas and kurtis that comes our way from fusion beats. They can be easily styled and never fail to catch hold of the latest fashion trends. Pair these with solid leggings and strappy flats for an ethnic look with a twist. Product Details Multi coloured printed kurta, has a V neckline, embroidered panel and trims diagonally around the neckline from the right shoulder to under the left sleeve and short sleeves which are tapering at the cuffs Material and Care Blended Hand wash cold Do not iron on decorations Size Regular Fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
